title: Section — Critical Path
description: The most schedule-critical items distilled from the other sections (QTO, submittal lead times, schedule, scope), each ranked with a plain-language explanation of why it drives the job. A second list captures alternates — substitutions, sequencing, or procurement moves that would accelerate the schedule or head off a problem. Items carry a MasterFormat division so they sort and link to their trade.

reason.description: Why this is on the critical path, in one or two sentences.

driver.description: What kind of constraint drives it.

related_submittal_id.description: submittal_log.entries[].submittal_id when a long-lead submittal drives it.

related_takeoff_ids.description: QTO takeoff_ids this item depends on.

alternates.description: Alternates that would accelerate the schedule or prevent a problem.

type.description: Does it speed the schedule or reduce risk?
